posts.author: Ben.felt (Benjamin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

Is there any way to incorporate the Creative Briefs (column) as a tool on a dashboard? If not, this would be a great feature as it essentially allows the creation of a form for anything, rather than just the contents of the columns. Currently, the form tool lacks the editability of the Creative Briefs.

Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Ben.felt,

Would you be happy to share a screenshot of the specific column and/or template you’re referring to? Just want to be sure I am understanding exactly what you are looking to achieve here
